exemplar.title: How can we know that current knowledge improves past knowledge

detailedExemplarData.title: How can we know that current knowledge improves past knowledge

strengths: Three distinct, specific objects are clearly identified and situated in authentic realâworld contexts.
Explicit links to IA prompt #13 are consistently made with concrete examples and appropriate citations.
Evidence is generally wellâsupported, including quantitative comparisons and historical/contextual details.
Diverse source material (academic, archival, personal) demonstrates good research breadth and authenticity.
The conclusion connects insights across objects, offering a broad perspective on knowledge evolution.
weaknesses: Analysis depth is uneven: some sections rely on broad assertions without fully unpacking underlying TOK concepts.
Commentary occasionally drifts into narrative or anecdote rather than sustained critical evaluation.
Discussion of limitations and tradeâoffs (e.g., Roman concrete vs. convenience) is present but not rigorously developed.
TOK terminology (e.g., ways of knowing, epistemic communities) is underused, diminishing analytical precision.
Reference formatting is inconsistent, and online sources lack access dates.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The submission fulfills the descriptors of the 9â10 band in most respects: three specific objects are well contextualized, links to the IA prompt are clear and supported with concrete evidence, and citations are provided. However, the uneven analytical depth, occasional overreliance on descriptive narrative, and limited use of TOK terminology prevent it from reaching the absolute top of the band. A score of 9 reflects the high quality of the exhibitionâstrong selection, clear justification, and solid evidential supportâwhile acknowledging areas for deeper conceptual engagement and improved academic rigor.

annotations.comment: The theme âKnowledge & The Knowerâ is stated but not explicitly connected to subsequent analysis; the student should link this theme to each objectâs discussion to clarify relevance.
The word count is under the limit, demonstrating conciseness, but consider tightening the introduction to allocate more space for analytical depth.
The object âIBM System 360 used by NASAâ is identified with specific context, which strengthens the exhibitionâs real-world grounding.
Quantitative comparison of RAM provides strong evidence of technological improvement, effectively illustrating the promptâs focus on knowledge progression.
To strengthen the link to the prompt, explicitly discuss how these performance gains reflect shifts in epistemic communities and knowledge production methods.
The elaboration on IBMâs role in Apollo 11 contextualizes knowledge application historically, reinforcing the objectâs relevance.
The selection of IA prompt #13 is clear, but the introduction could frame why this prompt is particularly significant to the theme, establishing stronger justification for its selection.
The caption provides origin details but could better integrate the technological relevance of the image in relation to knowledge development.
This introductory narrative is descriptive; the student should embed TOK concepts (e.g., methodology, reliability) to deepen the analysis beyond description.
The conclusion remains open-ended; for rigor, the student should articulate a clear judgment on whether current knowledge indeed surpasses past knowledge.
Suggest specifying criteria used to evaluate AI versus Roman concrete, such as sustainability or epistemic robustness, to ground the conclusion.
The use of diverse sources including academic and archival materials demonstrates good research breadth.
Reference formatting is inconsistent (dates and titles); standardize citation style to enhance academic rigor.
The description of GUI advancements is insightful but would benefit from TOK terminology such as âways of knowingâ to link technology changes to knowledge acquisition.
The selection of a personal district image creates a vivid context, strengthening the exhibitionâs real-world authenticity.
The claim that physical maps are âbecoming obsoleteâ is asserted without counterperspectives; the student should consider stability and tactile knowledge in traditional cartography.
The anecdote is engaging but would gain depth by explicitly connecting personal observations to broader knowledge frameworks like perspective and authority.
The comparison of static globes and dynamic Google Earth effectively highlights evolving knowledge tools and limitations of earlier methods.
The argument about real-time data use is broad; include specific examples of how this data has impacted decision-making to substantiate the claim.
To enrich analysis, introduce a counterclaim on the value of tactile or collaborative map reading to illustrate the nuance in knowledge improvement.
The third object is clearly stated with historical depth, demonstrating a strong link across temporal knowledge.
The explanation of self-healing properties provides fascinating evidence, but the student should relate this to epistemic criteria like durability as a form of reliability.
Using rhetorical questions is engaging, yet the student must move beyond questioning to critically evaluate trade-offs and impact on knowledge progression.
The conclusion connects Roman concrete insights to AI, offering a broad perspective on knowledge evolution.
Web sources lack date accessed; including access dates will improve credibility and traceability of online references.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
